source_path: 1. Contact360 user and billing and credit system/1.0 — User Genesis.json
title: Version 1.0 — User Genesis
summary: **Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter · `.1`–`.2` P0-heavy **Service task slices** · `.3`–`.6` P1 / surface-data · `.7`–`.9` ops + minor freeze.
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["1.0.x User Genesis"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    signup["register mutation"] --> jwt["access plus refresh tokens"]
    jwt --> starter["credits seeded e.g. 50 starter"]
    starter --> finder["email finder GraphQL"]
    finder --> deduct["deduct_credit feature gate"]
    deduct --> lambda["emailapis or emailapigo"]
    lambda --> results["results to app"]
    results --> gate["1.0 release gate"]
micro_gate:
**Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter · `.1`–`.2` P0-heavy **Service task slices** · `.3`–`.6` P1 / surface-data · `.7`–`.9` ops + minor freeze.
Theme: **Ignition** — names in per-patch `1.0.P — *.md` files.

contract.text: Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Freeze **auth** types: `login`, `register`, `logout`, `refresh_token`, `me` — see **Service task slices** in `1.0.P` patch files (scope from former `appointment360-user-billing-task-pack.md`).
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Document **finder credit cost** vs verifier (per roadmap 1.2 policy).
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: `usage(feature)` response shape for header credits counter.

Completed: 📌 Planned: **[appointment360]** — refine duplicate task (was: 📌 planned: **[architecture]** — product **graphql** remains …) | patch `1.0.0` band `0` | reason: specialize this file vs sibling patches; see docs/codebases/appointment360-codebase-analysis.md
Input contract for `EmailFinderInput` matches required fields (`firstName`, `lastName`, `domain`, optional `website`) per [`docs/backend/apis/15_EMAIL_MODULE.md`](../backend/apis/15_EMAIL_MODULE.md).
Normalize identity keys (case-insensitive domain; trimmed names) so cache keys don’t split logically identical inputs.
Finder results map to `EmailResult { uuid, email, status, source }` and preserve `source` (“connectra”, “pattern”, “generator”).
Ensure finder spends the correct feature bucket used by `UsageQuery` (`EMAIL_FINDER` / normalized equivalent).
Finder UI `FinderSingleSearch` validates inputs, calls the finder request binding, and renders:
fields: Name, Company Domain, Email Address, Confidence Percentage.
Copy action uses the found email result.
Ensure usage rows are created/updated for `EMAIL_FINDER` on first successful finder.
finder failure returns structured GraphQL errors without leaking provider internals.

service.text: Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Implement **password hash**, **JWT HS256**, **token_blacklist** on logout.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **`deduct_credit(user_uuid, feature, amount)`** before expensive email operations.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **`require_auth`** on protected resolvers; block at zero balance with explicit error.

Completed: 📌 Planned: **[appointment360]** — refine duplicate task (was: 📌 planned: **[architecture]** — **go/gin satellites** in sco…) | patch `1.0.0` band `0` | reason: specialize this file vs sibling patches; see docs/codebases/appointment360-codebase-analysis.md

surface.text: Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **app:** `/login`, `/register`, profile stub, finder/verifier entry pages, credits in header.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **root:** marketing CTAs to auth (per connectra pack).
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **app:** `SessionContext` and `RoleContext` providers wired into app layout for auth gating.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **app:** `UpiPaymentModal` integration reference for credit top-up (delivery in `1.3`).

Completed: 📌 Planned: **[appointment360]** — refine duplicate task (was: 📌 planned: **[architecture]** — **next.js** customer surface…) | patch `1.0.0` band `0` | reason: specialize this file vs sibling patches; see docs/codebases/appointment360-codebase-analysis.md
Auth pages, dashboard shell, finder/verifier flows, credits display.

data.text: Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **`users`**, **`credits`** (or equivalent), **`token_blacklist`** migrations applied.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Lineage: user uuid as foreign key for usage rows.

Completed: 📌 Planned: **[appointment360]** — refine duplicate task (was: 📌 planned: **[architecture]** — **postgresql-first** per `do…) | patch `1.0.0` band `0` | reason: specialize this file vs sibling patches; see docs/codebases/appointment360-codebase-analysis.md
**PostgreSQL (gateway):** users, credits, token_blacklist; usage/activity as per schema.
**S3:** optional — not required for core `1.0.0` auth path.

Completed: **contact360.io/api** — SQLAlchemy models for `users`, `user_profiles`, `token_blacklist`, `subscription_plans`, `plan_periods`, `addons`, `user_subscriptions`, `user_addon_purchases`, `payment_submissions`, `two_factor` all defined in `app/models/` with Alembic migrations in `alembic/`.

ops.text: Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Smoke: signup → first finder → ledger decrement trace.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Document rollback: feature flag to disable finder if credit bug.

Completed: ✅ Completed: ⬜ Incomplete: **contact360.io/email (Mailhub)** — `src/components/login-form.tsx` stores `data.id` (`userId`) in `localStorage` after login (`localStorage.setItem("userId", data.id)`) but does NOT store a JWT or session token; all `Authorization: Bearer` headers in subsequent API calls (`account/[userId]/page.tsx`, `email-list.tsx`, `email/[mailId]/page.tsx`) are commented out — complete the auth flow: store the JWT returned by `POST /auth/login`, include it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on all protected API calls, and implement token refresh / logout.

Completed: ✅ Completed: ⬜ Incomplete: **contact360.io/email (Mailhub)** — `src/app/account/[userId]/page.tsx` declares `const [token, setToken] = useState<string | null>(null)` and reads `localStorage.getItem("token")` but `login-form.tsx` never sets a `"token"` key in localStorage (it sets `"userId"`); the token is never available for authenticated API calls — align the localStorage key: either store `token` in `login-form.tsx` or use `"userId"` consistently.

Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **contact360.io/email (Mailhub)** — implement session expiry handling: when any API call returns `401 Unauthorized`, clear `localStorage` (`mailhub_active_account`, `userId`, `token`), set context state to null, and redirect to `/auth/login`; currently a `401` just returns an empty email list with no user feedback.

Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **contact360.io/email (Mailhub)** — add `GET /auth/me` (or `GET /auth/user/:userId`) session validation to `LayoutClient.tsx`; on first mount, verify the stored session is still valid before rendering the email shell; this prevents stale `userId` values from causing confusing UX after backend token expiry.

Completed: ✅ Completed: ✅ Completed: **contact360.io/app (Dashboard)** — full JWT auth flow implemented: `authService.ts` calls `mutation Login/Register/RefreshToken` via GraphQL; `AuthContext` stores tokens via `tokenManager.ts`, auto-refreshes every 60s, maps backend role strings to `UserRole` enum (`FreeUser`, `ProUser`, `Admin`, `SuperAdmin`), and exposes `login`, `register`, `logout`, `refreshUser` hooks.

Completed: ✅ Completed: ✅ Completed: **contact360.io/app (Dashboard)** — role-based access control implemented via `RoleContext` + `featureAccess.ts`; features (`AI_CHAT`, `BULK_EXPORT`, `API_KEYS`, `TEAM_MANAGEMENT`, `EMAIL_FINDER`, `VERIFIER`, `LINKEDIN`, `DATA_SEARCH`, `ADVANCED_FILTERS`, `SAVE_SEARCHES`, `BULK_VERIFICATION`, `IMPORT`) are mapped to minimum role and free-tier limits.

Completed: ✅ Completed: ⬜ Incomplete: **contact360.io/app (Dashboard)** — `billing/page.tsx` defines local `FALLBACK_PLANS` and `FALLBACK_ADDONS` arrays with hardcoded prices (Starter $29, Pro $99, Enterprise "Custom") that are shown when the `useBilling` API call fails; these fallback values may go stale — replace with a skeleton loading state and a retry button instead of silently showing outdated pricing.

Completed: ✅ Completed: ⬜ Incomplete: **contact360.io/app (Dashboard)** — `billingService.ts` `subscribe()` and `purchaseAddon()` mutations submit payment intent but actual UPI payment verification is handled by `submitPaymentProof` uploading a screenshot S3 key — there is no automated payment verification; the billing flow depends on manual admin review of uploaded screenshots — document this process and add an `Invoice` status indicator so users know their payment is pending review.

Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **contact360.io/app (Dashboard)** — complete 2FA setup/teardown flow in `ProfileTabSecurity`: `twoFactorService.ts` exists in the services directory but the enable/verify-TOTP-code/disable UI flow in the profile security tab needs to be audited and completed.

Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **contact360.io/app (Dashboard)** — wire S3 upload step in `UpiPaymentModal`: `billingService.submitPaymentProof` accepts `screenshotS3Key` but the modal's proof upload button needs to call `s3Service.ts` upload first before submitting — wire the full upload → submit flow end-to-end.

Completed: 📌 Planned: **[appointment360]** — refine duplicate task (was: 📌 planned: **[architecture]** — **observability**: correlate…) | patch `1.0.0` band `0` | reason: specialize this file vs sibling patches; see docs/codebases/appointment360-codebase-analysis.md
